activities.title: Flight OTW Bali ✈️
activities.description: Sit back, relax, and enjoy the flight — Bali is just around two hours away. Get some rest or grab a snack!

activities.title: Arrival at Ngurah Rai
activities.description: Collect your luggage at the carousel and don't forget to take a group photo at the iconic 'Welcome to Bali' sign!

activities.title: The Rest is Yours
activities.description: No plans, no schedules, no one telling you where to be. Go wherever the wind takes you — Bali is yours for the day.

activities.title: All Yours — No Strings Attached
activities.description: Wake up whenever. Go wherever. Do whatever. No agenda, no itinerary, no rules. Just you and Bali.

activities.title: Own the Day
activities.description: No direction, no obligations. Go explore, go rest, go get lost — whatever feels right. The day is wide open.

activities.title: Last Run — Make It Count
activities.description: Final hours in Bali. No agenda, no rush. Squeeze in whatever you haven't done yet — or just do nothing. Either way, soak it all in.

activities.title: Flight OTW Jakarta ✈️
activities.description: We're up in the air. Sit back, relax, and let the Bali vibes marinate one last time before reality hits.

activities.title: Touchdown Jakarta
activities.description: We made it back safe and sound. Welcome home, everyone. Jakarta hits different after Bali.
